color-cream-a16.comment: cream at 16% — the dark-mode counterpart to ink.a12

color-ink-600.comment: canonical Ink — warm near-black, text and borders

color-border-none.comment: an explicit absence — variants that keep the border box without drawing an edge

shadow-hard-ink.comment: hard offset shadow — the sticker lift, no blur

shadow-hard-cream.comment: dark-mode counterpart — light offset against dark surfaces

motion-tilt-subtle.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker tilt — components scale this by a per-instance multiplier in -1..1

motion-tilt-max.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker angle

motion-transform-lift.comment: how far an interactive surface rises on hover

font-size-hero.comment: container-query driven headline, above the fixed ramp

font-size-display.comment: hero only — fluid, sits above h1

font-size-h6.comment: meets body size — weight and family carry the distinction

size-control.comment: 48px — height of a tappable control. Padding sets the horizontal rhythm; this sets the vertical.

color-cream-a16.comment: cream at 16% — the dark-mode counterpart to ink.a12

color-ink-600.comment: canonical Ink — warm near-black, text and borders

color-accent-on-bold.comment: bold accents stay light in dark mode, so ink still reads on them

color-accent-on-subtle.comment: subtle accents are deep in dark mode — needs the light foreground

shadow-hard-ink.comment: hard offset shadow — the sticker lift, no blur

shadow-hard-cream.comment: dark-mode counterpart — light offset against dark surfaces

motion-tilt-subtle.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker tilt — components scale this by a per-instance multiplier in -1..1

motion-tilt-max.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker angle

motion-transform-lift.comment: how far an interactive surface rises on hover

font-size-display.comment: hero only — fluid, sits above h1

font-size-h6.comment: meets body size — weight and family carry the distinction

size-control.comment: 48px — height of a tappable control. Padding sets the horizontal rhythm; this sets the vertical.
